name: newb
description: Talk to your newbs from Codex. Auto-discovers every newb you have access to.

interface.shortDescription: Talk to your newbs from Codex.
interface.longDescription: One install, all your newbs. Sign in once with Google; every newb you have access to (owned or shared) shows up automatically as MCP tools under `mcp__newb__delegate_start__<slug>`, `mcp__newb__describe__<slug>`, etc. Tokens are stored in Codex's secure storage — no per-newb bearer secrets to manage.
